title: Martial Master
description: In a world where martial arts reign supreme, a young warrior named Qin Chen embarks on a journey to become the strongest martial master. Facing countless enemies and uncovering ancient secrets, he must overcome his limits and master the ultimate martial techniques to protect those he loves.

title: Soul Land 2: The Peerless Tang Sect (2023)
description: A world without magic, without Dou-Qi, without martial arts, but with Essence Spirits. On the Douluo Continent ten thousand years after the Tang Sect was founded, the Tang Sect declined. A generation of Tianjiao is born, can the new generation of Shrek Seven Monsters revive the Tang Sect and compose a peerless Tang Sect song? A million-year-old soul beast, holding the sun, the moon, and the stars, the holy god of death, and the brand-new soul tool system that led to the decline of the Tang Sect. All the magic will be revealed one by one. Can the hidden weapons of the Tang Sect regain its glory, and can the Tang Sect regain its former glory? The story of the new generation of Shrek Seven Monsters begins here.

title: Throne Of Seal
description: Long Haochen, a youth blessed by the goddess of light, embarks on a sacred mission to become a Knight of the Throne. Alongside his companions, he must battle demons, uncover ancient prophecies, and ultimately decide the fate of the mortal realm in this epic fantasy adventure.

title: Renegade Immortal
description: Wang Lin was an ordinary mortal who entered the world of cultivation through sheer determination. After being betrayed and facing countless hardships, he walks the path of a renegade, seeking power to protect what matters most. His journey transforms him from a simple villager into a legendary figure feared across the cultivation world.

title: Perfect World
description: In a world where cultivators strive for immortality, Shi Hao, a young boy with extraordinary origins, embarks on a journey to become the strongest. Born with supreme bone marrow, he faces jealousy, betrayal, and countless challenges. As he grows, he uncovers the mysteries of his past and fights to protect his loved ones and his homeland.

title: The Demon Hunter
description: In a world where demons and humans coexist in an uneasy peace, a young demon hunter named Kaito possesses the rare ability to sense demonic energy. When a powerful demon threatens to shatter the fragile balance, Kaito must embrace his destiny and protect humanity from the shadows.

title: Battle Through The Heavens
description: Xiao Yan was once a genius child who lost his powers and became the town's laughingstock. Now, with the help of a mysterious teacher residing in his ring, he must reclaim his strength and honor through rigorous training and dangerous adventures. His journey takes him across the continent, facing powerful enemies and uncovering ancient secrets.

title: Apotheosis
description: A boy with a mysterious past awakens his divine power and begins his journey to become a god. As Luo Zheng rises from humble beginnings, he discovers that his sister has been taken by a powerful clan. Determined to rescue her, he cultivates ancient techniques, uncovers the secrets of his heritage, and challenges the very heavens themselves.

title: Against The Sky Supreme
description: A powerful cultivator who has reached the peak of cultivation returns to his younger self to change his fate. Armed with memories of his past life, he navigates a world of scheming clans, ancient treasures, and dangerous beauties. This time, he'll seize every opportunity and challenge the heavens themselves to reach new heights of power.

title: The Great Ruler
genre: Action, Adventure, Fantasy, Martial Arts, Romance, Comedy
description: In a world where powerful beings compete for supremacy, a young man named Mu Chen rises to become the Great Ruler. Born with a mysterious seal that limits his potential, he must overcome countless obstacles, face ancient beasts, and challenge the very fabric of reality. Alongside his companions and his beloved Luo Li, he fights to unite the Great Thousand World.

title: Solo Leveling(S2)
description: Sung Jinwoo, known as the weakest hunter of all mankind, gains the power to 'level up' after a near-death experience in a double dungeon. As he grows stronger, he discovers that the gates and monsters are just the beginning of a much larger conspiracy. Season 2 follows his journey as he becomes a true shadow monarch, commanding an army of shadows and facing enemies from both this world and beyond.
recommendations: The Angel Next Door Spoils Me Rotten

title: The Angel Next Door Spoils Me Rotten
image: Image & logo/The angel next door spoils me rotten.jpg
link: janime/The Angel Next Door Spoils Me Wrotten/episode1.html
description: Amane Fujimiya lives alone in an apartment, and his next-door neighbor is the school's angel, Mahiru Shiina. Despite their contrasting lives, a chance encounter leads to an unlikely relationship. As Amane takes care of the perfect but lonely Mahiru, their bond deepens, and both discover that love can be found in the most unexpected places.

title: One Hundred Years Of Qi Refining
link: donghua/One Hundred Year Of Qi Refining/episode1.html
description: Han Li, an ordinary youth with mediocre spiritual roots, enters the world of cultivation with nothing but determination and a mysterious portable bottle. While geniuses ascend rapidly, Han Li patiently accumulates power over a hundred years of qi refining, proving that persistence and cleverness can overcome any disadvantage.

title: Death Note
description: Light Yagami, a brilliant high school student, discovers a mysterious notebook that allows him to kill anyone whose name he writes in it. As he takes it upon himself to rid the world of evil, the world's greatest detective, L, emerges to stop him. What follows is a high-stakes game of cat and mouse where intellect and morality clash.
recommendations: The Angel Next Door Spoils Me Rotten

title: Return of the Divine Emperor
image: Image & logo/Return of the divine emperor.webp
description: The Divine Emperor, betrayed and killed by his closest ally, is reborn as a young disciple in a minor sect. With memories of his past life and knowledge of forbidden techniques, he begins his journey of revenge. Watch as he rises from obscurity to reclaim his throne and settle old scores.

title: World Defying Dan God
description: Chen Xiang, an alchemist with unparalleled pill-refining skills, finds himself transported to a world where alchemy is revered above all. Using his knowledge of ancient recipes and techniques, he rises through the ranks, creating pills that defy the heavens and challenging the established order of the cultivation world.

title: Lingwu Continent
description: On the mystical Lingwu Continent, young Long Chen awakens the power of the ancient dragon lineage. Forced to flee his homeland after a betrayal, he embarks on a journey across the continent, uncovering forgotten histories, making powerful allies, and challenging the tyrannical forces that threaten to plunge the world into darkness.

title: Shrouding The Heavens
description: Ye Fan, an ordinary university student, is transported to a mysterious world of cultivation along with his classmates. In this realm where the strong prey on the weak, he must adapt quickly to survive. As he uncovers the secrets of this world, he learns that the path to immortality is paved with danger, betrayal, and unimaginable power.

title: Immortal Doctor in Modern City
image: Image & logo/immortal doctor in modern city.jpg
description: After cultivating for a thousand years in another realm, an immortal doctor returns to Earth and finds himself in modern Shanghai. Using his ancient medical knowledge and cultivation techniques, he navigates the complexities of urban life, treating incurable diseases, dealing with arrogant CEOs, and occasionally battling rogue cultivators who threaten the peace.

title: Peerless Battle Spirit
description: Qin Nan, a young warrior with a crippled martial spirit, refuses to accept his fate. When he discovers a mysterious pendant that allows him to absorb the spirits of mythical beasts, his journey to become the strongest cultivator begins. Watch as he challenges geniuses, uncovers ancient conspiracies, and awakens a power that even the heavens fear.

title: The Great Ruler(Season 2)
description: Season 2 of The Great Ruler continues Mu Chen's journey as he ventures into the Northern Heavens Spiritual Academy. Here, he faces even greater challenges, participates in the freshmen competition, and uncovers secrets about his mother's disappearance. With Luo Li by his side, he must grow stronger to face the enemies that await in the Great Thousand World.

title: Beyond The Timescape
description: In a world where time itself is a weapon, a young cultivator named Xu Qing discovers he possesses the rare ability to perceive and manipulate temporal energies. As he masters this power, he uncovers a cosmic conspiracy that spans millennia and learns that the greatest enemy might be his own future self.

title: Tales of Herding Gods
description: Qin Mu, a young cowherd raised in a village of outcasts, discovers that the ruins around his home hide secrets of an ancient civilization. As he learns cultivation from the village elders, he uncovers a world where gods once walked and where the line between human and divine is blurred. His journey will determine the fate of both realms.

title: The Other Side of Deep Space
image: Image & logo/the other side of deep space.webp
description: In a future where humanity has colonized the stars, anomalies in deep space lead to the discovery of cultivation techniques that blend technology with ancient martial arts. Chen Feng, a deep space explorer, finds himself at the center of a conflict between scientific civilization and the newly awakened cultivators from the cosmic void.

title: Immortality(Season 1)
description: Season 1 introduces us to a world where cultivators seek immortality through various paths. When a young man from a fallen sect discovers an ancient inheritance, he must navigate the treacherous politics of the cultivation world while uncovering the truth about his family's downfall.

title: Immortality(Season 2)
description: Season 2 continues the journey as our protagonist delves deeper into the mysteries of the ancient inheritance. New enemies emerge from the shadows, and alliances are tested. The path to immortality grows more dangerous as he discovers that some truths are better left buried.

title: Immortality(Season 3)
description: Season 3 raises the stakes as the conflict between sects escalates into all-out war. Our hero must make impossible choices, sacrifice personal desires for the greater good, and face enemies who have waited centuries for revenge. The secret of true immortality may cost him everything.

title: Immortality(Season 4)
description: Season 4 explores the cosmic scale of cultivation as our protagonist transcends mortal limitations. Ancient gods return, realms collide, and the very fabric of reality is threatened. The journey for immortality becomes a battle for existence itself.

title: Immortality(Season 5)
description: Season 5 brings the epic saga to new heights as the truth about immortality is finally revealed. With the fate of multiple realms hanging in the balance, our hero must make the ultimate sacrifice to protect everything he holds dear. The final battle will decide who truly deserves to be called immortal.

title: Tomb of Fallen Gods(Season 1)
image: Image & logo/tomb of fallen gods s1.jpg
description: Season 1 follows a group of explorers who discover an ancient tomb that predates human civilization. Within its depths, they find evidence of a race of beings who were worshipped as gods. As they delve deeper, they awaken something that should have remained sleeping.

title: Tomb of Fallen Gods(Season 2)
image: Image & logo/tomb of fallen gods s2.jpg
description: Season 2 continues the exploration of the tomb's deeper levels, where reality itself begins to warp. The explorers discover that the fallen gods were not merely worshipped—they were prisoners. Now, their jailers have awakened, and humanity's place in the universe is called into question.

title: Tomb of Fallen Gods(Season 3)
image: Image & logo/tomb of fallen gods s3.jpg
description: Season 3 reveals the ultimate secret of the tomb—it's not a prison but a gateway. Beyond lies the realm of the true gods, and the explorers must decide whether to open the door or seal it forever. Their choice will determine the fate of both worlds.
recommendations: The Other Side of Deep Space

title: Supreme Over The Sky
description: In a world where the sky itself is divided into nine heavens, a young cultivator rises from the lowest realm to challenge the gods above. Each heaven presents new trials and enemies, but his determination to reach the peak and uncover the truth about his origins drives him forward.

title: The Divine Emperor of Destiny
image: Image & logo/the divine emperor of destiny.jpg
description: Born under a prophecy that he would either save or destroy the world, a young emperor must navigate the treacherous politics of the imperial court while mastering forbidden cultivation techniques. As dark forces gather, he must choose between his destiny and his humanity.

title: Ten Thousand Worlds
description: When a cosmic anomaly connects ten thousand parallel worlds, cultivators from across the multiverse begin to intersect. A young hero from a low-level world must adapt quickly as beings of immense power descend upon his reality, bringing both opportunity and existential threat.
recommendations: The Other Side of Deep Space

title: Eclipse of Illusion
description: During a celestial eclipse, reality fractures, and illusions become tangible. A group of cultivators with unique abilities must navigate a world where nothing is as it seems. As they search for answers, they discover that the eclipse was not a natural phenomenon but a warning.
recommendations: The Other Side of Deep Space

title: Martial Universe(Season 1)
description: Season 1 introduces Lin Dong, a young man from a declining clan who discovers a mysterious stone talisman that holds the key to unlocking his potential. As he begins his journey into the martial world, he faces bullies, discovers ancient techniques, and learns that his destiny is greater than he ever imagined.

title: Martial Universe(Season 4)
description: Season 4 concludes Lin Dong's epic journey as he faces the ultimate threat to the martial world. Having mastered the power of the stone talisman, he must now confront ancient evils and make the final choice between power and peace. The fate of countless realms rests on his shoulders.

title: Martial Universe(Season 2)
description: Season 2 follows Lin Dong as he ventures into the wider world, entering the famous martial arts academy where he meets rivals and friends who will shape his path. The stone talisman reveals more of its secrets, and Lin Dong learns that the true test of a martial artist is not just power, but wisdom.

title: Martial Universe(Season 3)
description: Season 3 escalates the conflict as Lin Dong becomes a target for powerful enemies who seek the stone talisman. Forced to go on the run, he discovers hidden realms, ancient techniques, and the truth about his family's connection to the martial world's greatest mysteries.

title: Over Goddess(Season 1)
description: When a mortal man accidentally ascends to the realm of the gods, he discovers that divinity is not what he expected. Armed with modern knowledge and an unyielding spirit, he challenges the established order, winning the favor of goddesses and earning the enmity of gods. His journey to become 'Over Goddess' begins.

title: Way of Choices [Ze Tian Ji]
genre: Action, Fantasy, Adventure, Historical, Martial Arts
description: In a world where one's fate is determined at birth, a young man with a terminal illness defies destiny itself. Chen Changsheng, carrying a mysterious letter, arrives in the capital to change his fate. Armed with determination and an ancient cultivation technique, he challenges the heavens, making choices that will reshape the cultivation world.
